series_metadata.series_description: The Project Management Artifacts describe the documentation that aids in the management of a project. Examples of project management artifacts include but are not limited to project definition, scope, communications, risk, cost, issues, quality, status, lessons learned, project human resources and procurement, project charters, scope statements, project estimates and project actuals, project plans, and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from end of contract date large projects, from project completion or cancellation date reoccurring projects, 5 years from project completion or cancellation date medium non-reoccurring projects, 3 years from project completion or cancellation date small non-reoccurring projects. ; Paper: If scanned, verify image and securely . Otherwise from end of contract date large projects, from project completion or cancellation date reoccurring projects, 5 years from project completion or cancellation date medium non-reoccurring projects, 3 years from project completion or cancellation date small non-reoccurring projects
